patches_actually_applied.material_change_justification: Four new escalation events this cycle: Israel Gaza territorial expansion, aid flotilla seizure, Russia pre-ceasefire civilian targeting surge, and Sudan SAF multi-front offensive with gold mine strikes. All confirmed by Tier 1 sources.

new_value.event: Israel expanded territorial control from 53% to 58% of Gaza by moving Yellow Line westward
new_value.strategic_significance: Territorial expansion during ceasefire window establishes facts on ground ahead of final-status negotiations, reducing Palestinian negotiating leverage and elevating ceasefire collapse risk.

new_value.event: Israel seized Global Sumud Flotilla aid ships in international waters near Greece
new_value.strategic_significance: Aid seizure in international waters raises freedom-of-navigation precedent questions and accelerates humanitarian crisis in Gaza, compounding displacement velocity and undermining diplomatic goodwill.

new_value.event: Russia killed 73+ civilians in deadliest 2026 strike wave between 4-8 May ahead of Victory Day ceasefire
new_value.strategic_significance: Pre-ceasefire civilian targeting pattern signals deliberate coercive pressure on Ukrainian political leadership and civilian morale, using casualties as diplomatic leverage and elevating ceasefire collapse risk.

new_value.event: Sudan SAF launched multi-front offensive in Blue Nile state (Damazin) and South Kordofan (Kadugli) with manned airstrikes on RSF-controlled gold mines
new_value.strategic_significance: Multi-front expansion with economic warfare component signals SAF intent to degrade RSF funding and expand territorial control simultaneously, elevating partition risk and Chad spillover risk in year-4 of war.

patches_actually_applied.rationale: Four new escalation events confirmed by ACLED and Crisis Group Tier 1 sources warrant append to active_escalation_events log.

patches_actually_applied.material_change_justification: Two new F4 flags applied this cycle: Gaza Hamas counter-narrative on disarmament and Russia pre-ceasefire information operations. Both assessed based on pattern consistency with prior information operations.

new_value.detail: Hamas rejection of disarmament plan and counter-offer framing may be accompanied by coordinated inauthentic behavior amplifying sovereignty narrative
Russia pre-ceasefire strike surge likely accompanied by information operations framing Ukraine as ceasefire spoiler

patches_actually_applied.rationale: Two new F4 flags applied based on pattern consistency with prior information operations in Gaza and Russia-Ukraine theatres.

patches_actually_applied.material_change_justification: Gaza Board of Peace disarmament mediation at impasse; Russia-Ukraine Victory Day ceasefire fragile. Sudan Quad mediation collapsed. Material changes to mediation architecture across three theatres.

new_value.un_security_council: No active UNSC resolution on Gaza disarmament; US diplomatic de-weighting applied to Board of Peace brokerage per 2026 calibration
No active UNSC resolution on Russia-Ukraine ceasefire; Trump mediation carries reduced I5 weight per US diplomatic de-weighting
Quad mediation collapsed; no active UNSC resolution or mediation framework

patches_actually_applied.rationale: Material changes to mediation architecture in Gaza, Russia-Ukraine, and Sudan theatres warrant update to mediation_deescalation_architecture.
